programs.title: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily
programs.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring reporting from the magazine that helps global leaders stay ahead, plus insight on the people, companies and trends shaping today's complex economy.

programs.title: Bloomberg: The Close
programs.desc: Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld break down the day's top market-moving stories and trading action around the closing bell.

programs.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programs.desc: "Bloomberg Balance of Power" with host David Westin is a daily look at how politics is impacting global business decisions; top lawmakers, business executives and government leaders join to discuss doing business in today's volatile political climate.

programs.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programs.sub_title: AJ Andrews on Growing Baseball's Audience
programs.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with AJ Andrews on baseball's momentum, softball's growth and why storytelling and authenticity are key to building the next generation of fans.

programs.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programs.sub_title: How NFL Legend Steve Young Built a $10 Billion Fund
programs.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly speak with Steve Young about his journey from NFL stardom to managing a $10 billion fund, discussing the challenges and lessons learned along the way.

programs.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programs.desc: Bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia; Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets, from tech, to geopolitics, and the world's energy transition.
